title: Benchmark Reiterates Buy Rating on Indie Semiconductor
text: Benchmark maintained its Buy rating and $8.00 price target for Indie Semiconductor Inc. The analyst action follows the company's announcement regarding a significant acquisition. Indie Semiconductor agreed to purchase ams OSRAM's fabless CMOS image sensor business for 40 million euros. The payment structure includes 35 million euros in cash at closing and a 5 million euros vendor note payable after two years. The acquisition is projected to close during Q3 2026. Management indicated the transaction is expected to be immediately accretive. The semiconductor company's shares have surged 79.55% over the past twelve months. Recently reported Q1 2026 earnings showed the company missed expectations on EPS at -$0.21 versus anticipated -$0.06, though revenue slightly exceeded forecasts at $55.5 million compared to projected $55.11 million.
